data.description:

Larvotto Resources Limited ( (AU:LRV) ) has shared an update.

Larvotto Resources Limited has called its Annual General Meeting for 29 May 2026 at its Nedlands, Western Australia offices, inviting shareholders to attend or participate via proxy voting. The company is encouraging investors to lodge proxy forms ahead of the meeting and to monitor its website and ASX announcements for any updates to the arrangements.

In line with provisions of the Corporations Act, Larvotto will not mail hard copies of the meeting notice, instead providing digital access through its website. The company is also soliciting shareholder questions in advance and during the meeting, signalling an emphasis on electronic communication and streamlined governance processes that may improve engagement and reduce administrative costs.

More about Larvotto Resources Limited

Larvotto Resources Limited is an Australian-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and development. The company operates within the mining sector, targeting resource projects in Western Australia and potentially other regions, and maintains an active shareholder base engaged through ASX disclosures and formal meetings.

data.description:

Red Sky Energy Limited ( (AU:ROG) ) just unveiled an update.

Red Sky Energy has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting to be held online on 28 May 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Melbourne time, with shareholders able to access the meeting and related documents via the company’s website and ASX announcements platform. The company is encouraging shareholders to lodge directed proxies appointing the chair by 26 May 2026, outlining multiple electronic and mail options for submitting proxy forms and noting it will update the market via ASX if any alternative AGM arrangements become necessary.

The notice reflects an ongoing shift toward virtual shareholder engagement, which can broaden participation but also places greater emphasis on timely proxy voting and clear online access. For investors, the AGM remains a key forum for oversight and governance, and Red Sky’s instructions underscore the importance of shareholder preparation ahead of resolutions to be considered at the meeting.

More about Red Sky Energy Limited

Red Sky Energy Limited is an Australia-based energy company listed on the ASX under the ticker ROG. The company operates in the oil and gas sector and is headquartered in Melbourne, focusing on exploration and development activities within the Australian energy market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Nordic Mining Targets Steady-State Output at Engebø After Challenging First Production Year
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Nordic Mining ASA ( (DE:7NM0) ).

Nordic Mining has published its 2025 annual report, highlighting the first year of production at its Engebø mine, where it produced 150 metric tons of rutile and 12,729 metric tons of garnet but experienced a slower ramp-up due to plant uptime, equipment reliability issues, and bottlenecks in the dry plant. The company has launched an improvement plan for 2026, brought in new operational management and expert partners, and maintains a target of reaching steady-state production at design capacity by the end of 2026, with the board assessing liquidity as sufficient though with limited headroom.

Management sees 2026 as a year of operational consolidation, expecting main performance gains from the second quarter and significant effects in the second half as Engebø moves toward unlocking its long-term earnings potential in markets characterized by tightening supply and rising demand for critical minerals. Beyond Engebø, Nordic Mining plans to further develop its high-purity quartz deposit in Kvinnherad, reinforcing a growth pipeline that could strengthen its strategic position in European critical minerals supply and support long-term shareholder value despite near-term operational and financial constraints.

More about Nordic Mining ASA

Nordic Mining ASA is a Norway-based resource company focused on critical minerals, listed on Euronext Oslo Børs. Through its Engebø Rutile and Garnet operation on Norway’s west coast, the first greenfield mine in the country in four decades, it aims to become one of the few global natural rutile producers and the only garnet producer in Europe, while also advancing a high-purity quartz project in Kvinnherad.

Average Trading Volume: 279,215

Current Market Cap: NOK1.47B

IDEX Biometrics ( (IDXAF) ) has issued an update.

IDEX Biometrics ASA, a Norwegian fingerprint biometrics specialist focused on secure payment and digital identity cards, has completed a private placement raising approximately NOK 80 million in new equity. From 29 April 2026, its shares trade without rights to a planned subsequent repair offering, clarifying entitlement for existing and new investors.

The transaction strengthens the company’s capital base to support ongoing commercialization of its biometric solutions and may enhance its competitive position in the growing market for secure authentication technologies. The ex-date announcement helps the market price the shares correctly relative to participation in the potential follow-on offering, providing greater transparency for stakeholders.

More about IDEX Biometrics

IDEX Biometrics ASA is a global technology company specializing in fingerprint biometrics, providing authentication solutions across payments, access control and digital identity. The company focuses on card-based applications for secure payments and digital authentication, leveraging patented sensor technologies, integrated circuits and software, and works with leading card manufacturers and technology partners to bring its products to market.

data.title: TotalEnergies Lifts Q1 2026 Profit and Dividend on Higher Production and Strong Markets
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ) has provided an announcement.

TotalEnergies reported a strong first quarter of 2026, with adjusted net income rising to $5.4 billion and cash flow from operations to $8.6 billion, supported by a 4% organic production increase that offset disruptions from the Middle East conflict. The company’s gearing ratio stood at 15.5%, and the board approved a 5.9% increase in the first interim dividend to €0.90 per share while maintaining a share buyback program of up to $1.5 billion in the second quarter.

Operationally, oil and gas production reached 2.553 million barrels of oil equivalent per day, driven by new project ramp-ups in Brazil and Libya, portfolio optimization in the U.K. and discoveries in Congo. The integrated LNG and power segments benefited from higher production, trading volatility and expanded gas-to-power assets in Europe, while downstream refining and trading captured exceptional margins, and the group advanced social, environmental and consumer protection initiatives in key markets.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies SE is a global integrated energy company operating across oil, natural gas, liquefied natural gas, refining, petrochemicals and power, including a growing renewables portfolio. Listed in Paris, London and New York, it focuses on leveraging an integrated model in hydrocarbons and power to capture market volatility while gradually expanding low-carbon and flexible generation assets, particularly in Europe and other key regions.

data.title: Ironveld Nears First Magnetite Shipments as It Probes Strategic Mineral Upside
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Ironveld ( (GB:IRON) ) is now available.

Ironveld has completed key technical upgrades at its Lapon Plant in South Africa, including improved water systems, optimised cyclones and a new magnetic separator designed to deliver DMS-grade magnetite above 90% magnetic purity. Despite a brief weather-related delay, contractor Daemaneng expects first deliveries under an existing offtake in May 2026, ramping to 2,500 tonnes per month in June and targeting full plant capacity of 7,500 tonnes per month by the end of 2026.

Alongside the ramp-up, Ironveld is commissioning a mineralogical study by Mintek on Layer 21, a magnetite-bearing horizon containing ilmenite and apatite that may host rare earth elements across its mining rights. The work aims to clarify the presence of discrete titanium- and phosphate-rich layers and assess rare earth potential, which could influence future mine planning, by-product recovery and the company’s positioning in strategic minerals critical to modern technologies.

Spark’s Take on IRON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IRON is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects significant financial performance challenges, notably in profitability and cash flow management, which are critical to address for long-term stability. Technical analysis suggests bearish momentum, adding pressure on the stock. However, positive corporate events, such as successful fundraising and operational milestones, provide a counterbalance, indicating potential for improved future performance.

To see Spark’s full report on IRON stock, click here.

More about Ironveld

Ironveld PLC is a mining development company listed on AIM and focused on producing high-value strategic metals from its flagship asset in South Africa. The group is currently centred on magnetite extraction and processing, with an emphasis on supplying dense media separation‑grade magnetite and exploring additional value from titanium, phosphates, and potential rare earth elements within its mining rights area.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £4.97M
